name: bpmct
html: bpmct
css: .bpmct-wrap { width: 100%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #0a0018 0%, #1a0a00 60%, #2a1200 100%); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden; gap: 4%; } .bpmct-text { font-family: 'Georgia', serif; font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 8vw, 4rem); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.05em; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6a00 0%, #ff9a00 30%, #ffcc00 55%, #ff7a00 80%, #ff4500 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 18px #ff6a00) drop-shadow(0 0 40px #ff4500); animation: bpmct-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; position: relative; z-index: 2; flex-shrink: 0; } @keyframes bpmct-pulse { 0%, 100% { filter: drop-shadow(0 0 18px #ff6a00) drop-shadow(0 0 40px #ff4500); } 50% { filter: drop-shadow(0 0 32px #ffaa00) drop-shadow(0 0 70px #ff6a00); } } .bpmct-palm { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-end; width: clamp(30px, 10%, 60px); height: 70%; flex-shrink: 0; animation: bpmct-sway 3.5s ease-in-out infinite; transform-origin: bottom center; } .bpmct-palm-r { animation-delay: -1.2s; } .bpmct-trunk { width: 18%; height: 80%; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #5a3a10 0%, #8b5e1a 40%, #6b4510 100%); border-radius: 4px 4px 2px 2px; position: relative; } .bpmct-fronds { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 0; height: 0; } .bpmct-frond { position: absolute; width: clamp(18px, 6vw, 40px); height: clamp(5px, 1.5vw, 10px); background: linear-gradient(90deg, #1a7a10 0%, #2ecc20 40%, #1a9a10 100%); border-radius: 0 50% 50% 0; transform-origin: 0% 50%; } .bpmct-frond.f1 { transform: rotate(-60deg) translateX(2px); } .bpmct-frond.f2 { transform: rotate(-30deg) translateX(2px); } .bpmct-frond.f3 { transform: rotate(0deg) translateX(2px); } .bpmct-frond.f4 { transform: rotate(30deg) translateX(2px); } .bpmct-frond.f5 { transform: rotate(60deg) translateX(2px); } .bpmct-palm-r .bpmct-frond { border-radius: 50% 0 0 50%; transform-origin: 100% 50%; } .bpmct-palm-r .bpmct-frond.f1 { transform: rotate(60deg) translateX(-2px); } .bpmct-palm-r .bpmct-frond.f2 { transform: rotate(30deg) translateX(-2px); } .bpmct-palm-r .bpmct-frond.f3 { transform: rotate(0deg) translateX(-2px); } .bpmct-palm-r .bpmct-frond.f4 { transform: rotate(-30deg) translateX(-2px); } .bpmct-palm-r .bpmct-frond.f5 { transform: rotate(-60deg) translateX(-2px); } @keyframes bpmct-sway { 0%, 100% { transform: rotate(-4deg); } 50% { transform: rotate(4deg); } }
